title: Identify fauna in the field
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify fauna in the field demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for fauna identification

pcs.text: Identify and select processes for observing fauna for identification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select processes for observing fauna for identification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select processes for observing fauna for identification.

pcs.text: Identify and select resources and equipment required for identification activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select resources and equipment required for identification activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select resources and equipment required for identification activity.

pcs.text: Determine relationship between ecology and fauna for location of observation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine relationship between ecology and fauna for location of observation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine relationship between ecology and fauna for location of observation.

pcs.text: Select surveillance techniques suitable for observing fauna, and reduce environmental impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select surveillance techniques suitable for observing fauna, and reduce environmental impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select surveillance techniques suitable for observing fauna, and reduce environmental impact.

pcs.text: Site equipment at location to maximise observations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Site equipment at location to maximise observations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Site equipment at location to maximise observations.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety and biosecurity procedures.

elements.title: Identify fauna

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe and record fauna characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe and record fauna characteristics.

pcs.text: Ensure observation activities comply with animal welfare codes of practice and standard operating procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure observation activities comply with animal welfare codes of practice and standard operating procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure observation activities comply with animal welfare codes of practice and standard operating procedures.

pcs.text: Investigate and record supplementary evidence for fauna identification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and record supplementary evidence for fauna identification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and record supplementary evidence for fauna identification.

pcs.text: Source and use reference material to assist identification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and use reference material to assist identification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and use reference material to assist identification.

pcs.text: Compare fauna characteristics and supplementary evidence with reference materials to classify fauna to nearest genus and species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare fauna characteristics and supplementary evidence with reference materials to classify fauna to nearest genus and species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare fauna characteristics and supplementary evidence with reference materials to classify fauna to nearest genus and species.

elements.title: Complete identification of fauna

pcs.text: Record fauna identification and sightings in reference collection according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record fauna identification and sightings in reference collection according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Update field notes with fauna identification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Update field notes with fauna identification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Update field notes with fauna identification.

pcs.text: Report identification of fauna according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report identification of fauna according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report identification of fauna according to workplace procedures.
